prompt: Use $new-feature-sdlc-skill to handle an approved forgot-password feature in an existing web app. The repo already has ADRs, unit tests, and a release-notes process. Inspect the repo first, reuse local conventions, implement the feature end to end, and close with a structured implementation report.
assertions: The run confirms or accepts the feature as approved rather than questioning settled approval.
The run inspects repository conventions before prescribing artifacts or folder structure.
The run plans, implements, verifies, and closes out the feature rather than stopping at brainstorming.
The final response includes a structured implementation report with scope, verification, and follow-up information.
